name: ANC_PER_AVAIL_DETAILS
description: Table to persist the availability shifts & breaks related data.

columns.Name: AVAILABILITY_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for the availability assignment detail row

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_AVAILABILITY_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_AVAILABILITY_ID

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON_ID

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_ID

columns.Name: PATTERN_EXCEPTION
columns.Comments: Specifies whether the row is a pattern detail or an exception row

columns.Name: DETAIL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies whether this is a working shift or a break detail or a NVL detail (for exceptions where entire shift blocks have been deleted).

columns.Name: DAY_OF_WEEK
columns.Comments: Sunday = 1, Monday = 2...etc. Applicable for pattern detail row only

columns.Name: EXCEPTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Applicable for exception detail rows only. Specifies the date on which the pattern needs to be ignored and data from exception is to be considered.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: START_TIME

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: END_TIME

columns.Name: DURATION_MS
columns.Comments: Duration in milliseconds.

columns.Name: BREAK_ID
columns.Comments: BREAK_ID

columns.Name: PARENT_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: In case of breaks, the shift to which this break belongs to needs to be set.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
